subcodes.first_line: A Book from Us unto him who hath turned towards the Countenance and attained unto the lights of divine unity when the Sun of detachment shone forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب من لدنا الی الذی اقبل الی الوجه و فاز بانوار التوحید اذ اشرق نیر التجرید
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @Greatest Name
